key.name: video-path
key.description: Path to the video file

key.name: mute
key.description: Mute audio during playback

key.name: volume
key.description: Set the volume level for audio playback

key.name: random-start-position
key.description: Start playback from a random position each time a video starts

key.name: change-wallpaper-directory-path
key.description: Change Wallpaper Directory Path

key.name: change-wallpaper-mode
key.description: Control how to change wallpapers automatically

key.name: pause-on-maximize-or-fullscreen
key.description: Pause playback when there is maximized or fullscreen window

key.name: pause-on-focus
key.description: Pause playback when any window is focused

key.name: pause-on-battery
key.description: Pause playback when the device is on battery or the battery is low

key.name: low-battery-threshold
key.description: Set the threshold percentage for low battery level

key.name: pause-on-mpris-playing
key.description: Pause playback when an MPRIS media player is playing media

key.name: debug-mode
key.description: Enable printing debug messages to log

key.name: enable-va
key.description: Enable VA decoders for improved performance on Intel/AMD Wayland setups

key.name: enable-nvsl
key.description: Use new stateless NVIDIA decoders

key.name: prefer-clappersink
key.description: Prefer clappersink over gtk4paintablesink for video playback

key.name: force-mediafile
key.description: Force the use of GtkMediaFile for video playback

key.name: enable-graphics-offload
key.description: Enable graphics offload for improved performance (requires GTK 4.14+)

key.name: content-fit
key.description: Control how content fits within the GtkPicture

key.name: startup-delay
key.description: Add a startup delay (in milliseconds) to mitigate compatibility issues with other extensions

key.name: show-panel-menu
key.description: Show the panel menu for the extension

key.name: show-on-lock-screen
key.description: Show the live wallpaper on the lock screen

key.name: corner-radius
key.description: Corner radius in pixels for workspace background in the overview

key.name: border-stroke
key.description: Border width in pixels drawn inside the rounded-rect bounds (0 = disabled)

key.name: bounds-inset-x1
key.description: Additional inset for the left edge of the rounded-rect bounds (positive = move inward)

key.name: bounds-inset-y1
key.description: Additional inset for the top edge of the rounded-rect bounds (positive = move inward)

key.name: bounds-inset-x2
key.description: Additional inset for the right edge of the rounded-rect bounds (positive = move inward)

key.name: bounds-inset-y2
key.description: Additional inset for the bottom edge of the rounded-rect bounds (positive = move inward)
